query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, o.id as orderId
FROM users u
JOIN orders o ON o.userId = u.id
WHERE o.orderNumber = '00107';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, o.id as orderId
FROM users u
JOIN orders o ON o.userId = u.id
WHERE o.orderNumber = '00107';
